Massasoit — communal drum + fire-circle ambient
=================================================

Track:    massasoit_main.mp3
Composer: Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com)
Source:   https://incompetech.com/music/royalty-free/mp3-royaltyfree/Long%20Note%20Four.mp3
License:  Creative Commons: By Attribution 4.0

Vibe: cedar drum (slightly deeper than Squanto's) + low flute +
ambient forest. A leader's track — measured, watchful.
Same dignity bar as Powhatan.

NOTE: Kevin MacLeod's catalog does not contain authentic
cedar-drum + flute tracks. "Long Note Four" is a sparse
sustained bed used as a placeholder. RECOMMENDED: replace
with a Pixabay or OpenGameArt cedar-drum track once a
properly tagged CC0 source is sourced.

Required attribution (must appear in credits.html):
    "Long Note Four" Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com)
    Licensed under Creative Commons: By Attribution 4.0 License
